search.label: Search
search.typing: Type to search teams, players & managers…

boundaries.notFoundDescription: That URL doesn't match any page on PitchIQ. Head back to the dashboard to keep exploring.
boundaries.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page. You can try again, or head back to the dashboard.

dashboard.metaTitle: PitchIQ — Premier League Stats, Standings & Player Comparison
dashboard.subtitle: Standings, leaderboards, and fixtures.
dashboard.standingsUnavailable: Standings are temporarily unavailable. Try refreshing in a minute.
dashboard.standingsEmpty: No standings have been published yet for this season.
dashboard.classicMatchesEmpty: No classic matches for this season.

leaderboard.metaDescription: Premier League statistical leaderboards by season — goals, assists, appearances, clean sheets, saves, and more.

fixtures.noFixtures: No fixtures are available for this season.
fixtures.lineupsPending: Lineups will be published closer to kickoff.
fixtures.statsPending: Match statistics will appear during/after the game.
fixtures.statsMissingSide: Statistics are missing one side. Refresh to retry.
fixtures.lineupsUnavailableMsg: Starting-XI lineups aren’t available for this match. Our lineup feed covers recent seasons; older fixtures may not have them.
fixtures.eventsUnavailableMsg: Goal scorers, cards, and substitutions aren’t available for this match. The final score and team-level statistics still tell the story.
fixtures.noClassicMatches: No classic matches for this season.

notFound.teamDescription1: We couldn't find that team in our Premier League dataset. The URL may be malformed, or the club isn't one PitchIQ tracks.
notFound.teamDescription2: Browse the full Premier League roster for the canonical list.
notFound.playerDescription1: We couldn't find that player in our Premier League dataset. The URL may be malformed, or the player isn't in the selected season.
notFound.playerDescription2: Try comparing players, or head back to the dashboard.
notFound.managerDescription: We don't have a record for this manager. Browse the managers index to find who you're after.

teams.metaDescription: Browse all 20 Premier League clubs with stadium, founded year, and shareable filter links.
teams.listUnavailable: Club list is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
teams.everyClub: Every club in the {season} Premier League.
teams.clubCountHint: {total} clubs · click a card for the team profile
teams.squadUnavailableMsg: We don't have squad data for this team in the {season} season.
teams.statsUnavailable: Season statistics are unavailable for this team.

players.metaDescription: Browse Premier League players by season — most valuable (goals + assists) first, with position, club and nationality filters.
players.noData: No player data for this season
players.noDataMsg: Player data isn't available for this season yet.
players.metaDescriptionPlayer: {name} — {position}, {team}. Premier League season statistics on PitchIQ.
players.noSeasonDataMsg: {name} has no Premier League stats for the {season} season in our data. Their most recent season is {latest}.

managers.metaDescription: Premier League managers by season, ranked by points, with full match records.
managers.noData: No manager data for this season
managers.noDataMsg: Manager records are available from the 2008-09 season onwards.
managers.titlesBadge: {count, plural, one {# Premier League title} other {# Premier League titles}}

compare.metaDescription: Side-by-side Premier League player comparison — pick two and see the head-to-head stats, across any season or whole careers.
compare.heading: Compare players
compare.subtitle: Pick two players — any season, or whole careers — for a head-to-head.
compare.noComparisonMsg: One or both selected players have no Premier League stats for the chosen season. Try another season (or "All seasons"), or pick different players.
compare.pickSecond: Pick a second player to compare.
compare.shareBanner: ✨ This view is shareable — copy the URL to send this comparison to a friend.

metrics.radarAria: Radar comparison of {a} vs {b} across goals, assists, pass accuracy, tackles, dribbles, and shots on target

map.metaTitle: Map — 34 seasons of the Premier League
map.metaDescription: Every Premier League club on the map of Great Britain, 1992-93 to 2025-26 — slide through the seasons and watch the top flight change.
map.caption: The Premier League map — a journey through 34 seasons
map.attribution: Boundary data © Office for National Statistics, licensed under the <link>Open Government Licence v3.0</link>.
map.mapAria: Map of England and Wales — regions are clickable
map.markerInactive: {name} — not in the top flight in {season}
map.regionSummary: {clubs} clubs · {titles, plural, one {# PL title} other {# PL titles}} · {active} active in {season}

trivia.heading: Did you know?
trivia.factAttendance: The biggest crowd in {season} was {attendance} for {home} vs {away} at {venue}.
trivia.factCenturions: {team} amassed {points} points in {season} — a 100-point Premier League season.
trivia.factDiscipline: {leader} picked up the most yellow cards ({count}) — {gap} more than any other player.
trivia.factGiantKillers: Newly-promoted {name} beat all four of the top-four sides in {season}.
trivia.factGoalExtremes: {team} scored the most goals in the league ({goalsFor}) and conceded among the fewest ({goalsAgainst}).
trivia.factHeadToHead: No team in the bottom three has beaten a top-six side this season — across {relevant} such meetings.
trivia.factLopsided: The biggest win of the season so far was {home} beating {away} {homeScore}–{awayScore}.
trivia.factPlayerVsCollective: {player} has scored more goals on his own ({value}) than {teams} of the league's clubs managed all season.
trivia.factStreakLeague: {name} are on the longest current unbeaten run in the league ({run} matches).
trivia.factSurvival: The last team to avoid relegation in {season} stayed up on {points} points.
trivia.factSymmetricGoals: {a} and {b} both scored exactly {goals} goals this season.
trivia.factComebackKings: {team} came from behind at half-time to win {k} times in {season}.
trivia.factFailedToScore: {team} failed to score in {k} of their {n} matches in {season}.
trivia.factGoalRecord: {team}'s {gf} goals this season is their highest in the {n} seasons of data we hold.
trivia.factHomeFortress: {team} were unbeaten at home in {season} — {w} wins and {d} draws from {n} home games.
trivia.factManagerialMerryGoRound: {team} were managed by {count} different men in {season} — {names}.
trivia.factPositionRecord: {team}'s best league finish in the {n} seasons of data we hold is {rank}.
trivia.factYoYoClub: {name} have been relegated from the Premier League {count} times — one of the league's classic yo-yo clubs.
trivia.factStreakTeam: {team} are unbeaten in their last {run} matches.
trivia.factCareerGoals: {name} has scored {total} Premier League goals across the seasons in our data — past the {milestone} mark.
trivia.factCreativeArchitect: In {season}, {name} created chances worth {xa} expected assists ({assists} actual assists).
trivia.factFavouriteOpponent: {name}'s favourite opponent is {club} — {goals} goals in our match data.
trivia.factFinishingOverperformer: In {season}, {name} scored {goals} goals from just {xg} xG — outperforming his expected goals by +{d}.
trivia.factGoldenGlove: In {season}, {name}'s team kept {cs} clean sheets in {apps} appearances — a shutout in {rate}% of his games.
trivia.factHatTricks: {name} has scored {h} Premier League hat-tricks in our match data.
trivia.factMultiGoal: {name} has scored 2+ goals in {m} Premier League matches in our data.
trivia.factOpponentSpread: {name} has scored against {n} different Premier League clubs in our match data.
trivia.factTransferImpact: In {season}, {name} turned out for {clubs}, contributing {goals} goals and {assists} assists across them.
